## Runtime.RuntimeConfection class

Static factory for creating runtime confections. This class cannot be instantiated - use create() to get the appropriate concrete type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare abstract class RuntimeConfection 
```

## Example


```typescript
const result = RuntimeConfection.create(context, id, confection);
if (result.isSuccess()) {
  const runtimeConfection = result.value;
  if (runtimeConfection.isMoldedBonBon()) {
    console.log(runtimeConfection.shellChocolate);
  }
}
```
